title: Lighthouse & Performance Auditing
summary: Lighthouse is a free tool that audits a web page.
It scores performance, accessibility, and more.
It gives specific suggestions to improve.
It is built into Chrome's DevTools.

sections.text: Rather than guessing how good your page is, you can have a tool measure it and tell you exactly what to fix. Lighthouse is that tool, a free auditor that scores your page and hands you a clear list of improvements.

sections.title: What Lighthouse Does
sections.text: Lighthouse runs a series of checks on a page and gives it scores in several areas, including performance, accessibility, and best practices. It does not just give a number, it explains what hurt the score and suggests specific fixes, turning vague slowness into a concrete to do list.

sections.title: Where to Find It
sections.text: Lighthouse is built right into Chrome's DevTools, so you already have it. You open DevTools, run a Lighthouse report on your page, and read the results. It is the easiest way to get an honest, measured opinion of your page and a prioritized list of what to improve.

media.alt: A Lighthouse report showing scores and specific suggestions

sections.title: A Health Check Up
sections.text: Lighthouse is like a health check up for your page. It runs a battery of tests, gives you scores on different aspects of health, and hands you a report saying here is what is good, here is what to work on, and here is specifically how. You leave knowing exactly what to improve.

media.alt: A health check up producing scores and a clear list of things to improve

sections.title: Using Lighthouse
items: Run a Lighthouse report on your page.
Read the scores for performance, accessibility, and more.
Fix the highest impact items first.

sections.text: Lighthouse measures the Core Web Vitals you learned about, so it ties this whole chapter together, turning those three measures into a score with concrete advice on how to improve each one.

terms.definition: A free tool that audits a web page.
A set of checks that score a page.
A rating for an area like performance.
Where Lighthouse is built in, inside Chrome.

options: A free tool that audits a web page
